projects.custom_title: Digital Twin and Virtual Reality for Ergonomic Analysis
projects.custom_description: Developed a high-fidelity **VR** **Digital** **Twin** of an automotive assembly line using **Unreal** **Engine**. Integrated **Xsens** **motion** **capture** **suits** to map, track, and record realistic human movements to perform ergonomic analyses and simulations directly within the virtual environment.
A **Meta** **Quest** **3** driving app integrating realistic physics, diegetic UI, haptics, and a real-time vocal virtual instructor.
**Virtual** **Reality** project focusing on body tracking and user embodiment mechanics.
Dual project featuring advanced **Blender** mesh modeling and an interactive 3D game developed from scratch using **C++** and **OpenGL**.
AI-based analysis of athlete trajectories at the Ivrea Canoa Club slalom stadium. Implemented **YOLO** (Ultralytics) for real-time tracking and detection.
iOS application developed in **Unity** utilizing iPhone **LiDAR** sensors for biometric identity verification. Engineered a robust facial recognition pipeline.
Engineered an advanced Self-Supervised Learning system for audio denoising using a 20-layer **Deep** **Complex** **U-Net**.
Interactive mobile application built with **Kotlin**, designed to gamify the museum visitor experience.
Role-based educational task management web application demonstrating full-stack architecture with **React** and **Node.js**.
Full-stack e-commerce management system. Focused on robust API specifications, comprehensive unit and integration testing.
Built a complete demand paging VM system with a 9MB swapfile and hardware TLB management for a **MIPS** kernel in **C**.
Bare-metal implementation of the Quoridor board game on an **ARM** microcontroller developed entirely in **C**, managing hardware interrupts, CAN bus communication, and memory manually.
